File Controller Module¶

File I/O controller module.

Responsible for loading external game data, such as maps, configuration files, and saved state.

class controller.file_controller.FileController[source]¶

Handle file-based operations for the game.

This controller is responsible for loading and parsing external JSON data required by the game systems.

static get_maps_json()[source]¶

Load map data from JSON file.

The map file is read from:

data/maps.json

Returns:

Parsed JSON structure containing map data.

Return type:

dict | list
